name: Takashi Mitsuya

description: **Height:** 133 cm **Birthday in [Fate/kaleid](https://anilist.co/manga/33526/): **Jul 20 A young Teutonic aristocrat, she traveled to Japan to participate in the Holy Grail War as a Master. description: A struggling manga author with a supernatural power that enables, or rather, forces him to prevent deaths and catastrophes that happen near him by sending him back in time when an accident occurs, repeating the scene until the accident is prevented. ~!He falls into a coma for 15 years after he was nearly murdered by Yashiro!~

name: Migi
description: Migi is the Parasite which lives in [Shinichi](https://anilist.co/character/12323)'s hand. Unlike "successful" Parasites, Migi has no desire to kill humans for sustenance, and is nourished by the food Shinichi eats. Migi is, like other Parasites, completely without emotion. His primary consideration is survival, and he has threatened (and in some cases attempted) to kill other humans who pose a threat to he and Shinichi's secrecy. description: A member of the outdoor crew at high school, she’s drawn into camping when she meets [Rin](https://anilist.co/character/124586/Shima-Rin) at a lake shore. She’s always cheerful and positive and loves anything fun.

name: Kaiman
description: __Height:__ 216 cm (7'1) Kaiman is a human born in the Hole with an immunity towards magic. His lizard head being the result of a Magic User's curse, his main goal is to seek out the one who cursed him in order to change himself back.
